actions.action: Lock voice capture setup for 35 takes

details.title: First creator onboarding ready
details.description: RSP_001 actor imprint is locked. Voice capture infrastructure is live. The system is ready for the first 35 voice takes, which will establish the founding catalogue and prove the teaching → student → revenue pipeline.
details.reasoning: Actor protocol is live with 32/32 tests passing. RSP_001 imprint locked. → Revenue pipeline has 21/21 tests passing across all three scenarios. → 10 Creative Builder models deployed. Voice synthesis infrastructure ready.

actions.action: Run first recording session with RSP_001

details.title: NOIZYKIDZ teaching pipeline can launch with RSP_001 as founding teacher
details.description: Revenue schema supports teaching relationships with auto-split. RSP_001's voice assets can be made available to students. Teacher royalty (15%) + voice contribution share creates sustainable income for educators.
details.reasoning: Teaching scenario tested: student nets $1.78 on $3.00, teacher gets $0.47. Sustainable. → NOIZYKIDZ has no code yet. This creates the first real product for the brand. → Kids learning through a teacher's voice creates deep community bond.
